category_sources: Official nmstatectl user guide says nmstatectl is for users who want to try nmstate and documents querying/changing network state.
source_facts.description says it manages host networking settings declaratively.
display_name_sources: Official user guide title is The nmstatectl User Guide.
docs_sources: Official guide links the API document for network state format and definition.
Official nmstatectl user guide is dedicated CLI documentation.
Official quick start covers using nmstatectl and libnmstate.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nmstate/nmstate; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official user guide documents YAML/JSON network state query and apply commands.
source_facts.description identifies declarative host networking management.
